posts.author: sfuentes (Steven Fuentes)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Im trying to create an automation on our main board to give a specific member of our team a notification when a projects has not chance a certain status for 3 days after project was created. the column that is not showing is the one where the the creation date of the project is, the column is a mirrored column could that be the reason? is there anything I can do to get that automation set up?
